mapper.insert: INSERT INTO radio_sessions (id, user_id, mood, story, dj_ment, comfort_text, novel_excerpt, created_at) VALUES (#{sessionId}, #{userId}, #{mood}, #{story}, #{djMent}, #{comfortText}, #{novelExcerpt}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT rs.id, rs.user_id, rs.mood, rs.story, rs.dj_ment, rs.comfort_text, rs.novel_excerpt, rs.created_at, rr.id AS rr_id, rr.song_id, rr.order_num, rr.reason, s.title, s.artist FROM radio_sessions rs LEFT JOIN radio_recommendations rr ON rs.id = rr.session_id LEFT JOIN songs s ON rr.song_id = s.id WHERE rs.id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY rr.order_num ASC

SELECT rs.id, rs.user_id, rs.mood, rs.story, rs.dj_ment, rs.comfort_text, rs.novel_excerpt, rs.created_at, rr.id AS rr_id, rr.song_id, rr.order_num, rr.reason, s.title, s.artist FROM radio_sessions rs LEFT JOIN radio_recommendations rr ON rs.id = rr.session_id LEFT JOIN songs s ON rr.song_id = s.id WHERE rs.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY rs.created_at DESC, rr.order_num ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM radio_sessions WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT mood FROM radio_sessions WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO radio_recommendations (id, session_id, song_id, order_num, reason) VALUES (UUID(), #{sessionId}, #{songId}, #{orderNum}, #{reason})

INSERT INTO radio_recommendations (id, session_id, song_id, order_num, reason) VALUES
(UUID(), #{item.sessionId}, #{item.songId}, #{item.orderNum}, #{item.reason})
mapper.select: SELECT s.id AS songId, s.title, s.artist, rr.order_num, rr.reason FROM radio_recommendations rr JOIN songs s ON s.id = rr.song_id WHERE rr.session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY rr.order_num ASC

SELECT rs.mood, COUNT(rs.id) AS sessionCount, COALESCE(AVG(s.score), 0) AS avgSongScore, COUNT(rr.id) AS totalRecommendations FROM radio_sessions rs LEFT JOIN radio_recommendations rr ON rs.id = rr.session_id LEFT JOIN songs s ON rr.song_id = s.id GROUP BY rs.mood ORDER BY sessionCount DESC
